# Walid El Khoukh

Walid El Khoukh is a Cloud Data Engineer in Paris who builds governed data platforms and evidence-first AI products. His professional work covers AWS, GCP, Databricks, lakehouse architecture, data governance, and production pipelines. His AI Lab explores agent workflows, retrieval, public data, and token efficiency.

## Primary pages

- Portfolio: https://walidelkhoukh.com/
- French portfolio: https://walidelkhoukh.com/fr/
- Notes: https://walidelkhoukh.com/notes/
- MonÉlu AI and data case study: https://walidelkhoukh.com/monelu/
- Token budget estimator: https://walidelkhoukh.com/tools/token-budget/

## Selected notes

- How I Cut Claude Code Token Use by 87%: https://walidelkhoukh.com/notes/claude-code-token-optimization/
- The Government API Did Not Exist: https://walidelkhoukh.com/notes/government-api-did-not-exist/
